text: There is a sense of anticipation in the air, a quiet tension that comes from entering a place of innovation and display. The vibrant colors and bold lettering on the walls awaken my curiosity, while the abundance of glass and light hint at openness and possibility. The repetition of 'Okay. All right.' echoes my own effort to ground myself, preparing to engage with whatever knowledge or experience this space offers. I feel slightly disoriented by the angles and reflections, yet intrigued by what lies ahead.
